{{Infobox character
| name = Albedon Pegarthus
| aliases = Albedon
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Eraser Blade Combat Art}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Champion of the Prime Arena}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|fighter}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

''See also: [[Albedon Pegarthus Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Albedon Pegarthus, also known as Albedon, is a [[Visiri man]] and the current [[Champion]] of the [[Prime Arena]]. He possesses a large, imposing build with long limbs, short white hair over a red scalp, and heavy eyebrows. As the nephew of an influential Senator, he carries significant political connections. In combat, Albedon utilizes a specialized style known as the [[Eraser Blade]], a highly efficient and deadly technique designed to apply intense pressure on a single target. He fights with a large [[force-blade]] and wears thick arena armor. Although he has proven to be a formidable opponent capable of pushing others to their physical limits, he has previously conceded defeat in a duel against Raion. Despite his status, he has shown moments of caution regarding the consequences of certain confrontations and has been seen acting under the direction or name of [[Senator Pegarthus]] and the planet [[Visiria]].}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Albedon Pegarthus serves as the current [[Champion]] of the [[Prime Arena]] and fights as a representative for his influential uncle, [[Senator Pegarthus]]. A warrior characterized by white hair and a red scalp, he wields an orange [[force-blade]] of large proportions. In combat, Albedon utilizes the [[Eraser Blade]] [[Combat Art]], though he is a fighter who eventually made a mistake.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Albedon Pegarthus]] is the current [[Champion]] of the [[Prime Arena]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Albedon Pegarthus]] is the nephew of an influential Senator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Albedon Pegarthus]] is a fighter representing [[Senator Pegarthus]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27">''The Knight'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Albedon Pegarthus]] has white hair and a red scalp.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Albedon Pegarthus]] uses the [[Eraser Blade]] [[Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Albedon Pegarthus]] uses an orange [[force-blade]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Albedon uses a large [[force-blade]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Albedon is a fighter who made a mistake.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
